packages.name: yfinance
packages.purpose: Primary market data source for daily OHLCV, adjusted close, and related Yahoo Finance history.

packages.name: numpy
packages.purpose: Numerical array and vectorized math foundation for analytics and signal calculations.

packages.name: pandas
packages.purpose: Core tabular and time-series data handling across trading, trends, and reporting flows.

packages.name: matplotlib
packages.purpose: Static chart rendering for trend analysis and exploratory visuals.

packages.name: fastapi
packages.purpose: REST API framework for the paper_trading_ui backend.

packages.name: pydantic
packages.purpose: Validation and schema modeling for backend requests, responses, and settings.

packages.name: python-dotenv
packages.purpose: Loads environment variables for local backend and script configuration.

packages.name: uvicorn[standard]
packages.purpose: ASGI server used to run the FastAPI application locally and in lightweight deployments.

packages.name: httpx
packages.purpose: HTTP client used in API and integration tests.

packages.name: hypothesis
packages.purpose: Property-based testing library for broader edge-case coverage.

packages.name: pytest
packages.purpose: Primary test runner for unit and integration suites.

packages.name: pytest-cov
packages.purpose: Coverage plugin layered onto pytest for repository quality gates.

packages.name: pytest-mock
packages.purpose: pytest integration for mocking and patch-based test setup.
